events.name: 1. FC Union Berlin at Bayer Leverkusen

headlines.description: Bayer Leverkusen laboured to a 0-0 draw against visiting Union Berlin on Saturday as their Bundesliga title hopes faded with five matches remaining.
headlines.shortLinkText: Goalless draw sees Leverkusen's title hopes fade

video.headline: Leverkusen's title hopes damaged after goalless draw at home with Union Berlin

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Bayer Leverkusen vs. FC Union Berlin - Game Highlights) 2025/04/12 ESHEET

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund prevented Bayern Munich from going eight points clear in the Bundesliga on Saturday by fighting back for a 2-2 draw in "der Klassiker."
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern held by Dortmund to keep title race alive

video.headline: Waldemar Anton scores in the 75' to bring Dortmund level

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Waldemar Anton scores in the 75' to bring Dortmund level) 2025/04/12 ESHEET
